HomePage.title: SwarajyaRatna
HomePage.aboutText: SwarajyaRatna is a cultural initiative started in 2022 by 7 passionate members in Pune. Today, it has grown into a family of 100+ active members dedicated to spreading awareness through creative and digital mediums.
HomePage.serviceTagline: We are ready to perform in your Cultural events!

AboutPage.visionText: To create a culturally aware and united society inspired by Swarajya values.
AboutPage.missionText: SwarajyaRatna is a platform that showcases the untold stories of the Unsung heroes in Indian History. Focused on Education, it provides interactive content for all ages, using quizzes and maps to make history engaging and informative.
AboutPage.journeyText: What began in 2022 with just 7 members has now become a strong community of 100+ individuals working towards a shared vision.
AboutPage.focusText: Many textbooks and publications contain false information for political reasons, leading to distorted views. At SwarajyaRatna, we aim to spread positivity by highlighting these inaccuracies and providing factual corrections backed by evidence, ensuring users access reliable information about the Maratha warriors and their true contributions.
AboutPage.affiliationsText: SwarajyaRatna aims to establish partnerships with National Service Scheme (NSS) units to help promote the project and engage the local community. We actively coordinate and participate in events like the KJ’s Youth Fest at KJ’s Educational Institute, Trinity College of Engineering and Research.

ActivitiesPage.digitalDesc: Website, App, and online awareness campaigns
ActivitiesPage.communityDesc: Workshops and youth programs to foster connection
